title: bidens trichosperma
intro: Bidens trichosperma, also known as tickseed or three-lobe beggartick, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bidens trichosperma include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Bidens trichosperma can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, with some sources also using the plant in traditional cooking and as a tea.
